MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-08-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONSEN, JOAN MARIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 TURK #T-711 $1,371.43 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,371.43, STAYED UNTIL NOV-15-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59PM. NO FURTHER STAYS. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN FEES & COSTS. PLTF TO KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT. IF DEFT VACATES ON TIME, PLTF WILL WAIVE BACK RENT & DAMAGES, SET ASIDE JDMT & DISMISS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
